abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-global-use: Kooxaha caalamiga ah ee isticmaaluhu ku jiro ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-global-acc: Tirada wax ka beddelka caalamiga ah ee isticmaalaha abuuritaanka akoonka ($1)
Kooxaha caalamiga ah ee isticmaaluhu ku jiray xilligii abuuritaanka akoonka ($1)
action-centralauth-createlocal: Si khasab ah u samee akoon maxalli ah
action-centralauth-lock: Quful ama fur akoonnada caalamiga ah
action-centralauth-suppress: Qari ama astur akoon caalami ah
action-centralauth-unmerge: Ka saar isku darka akoonnada caalamiga ah
action-globalgroupmembership: Wax ka beddel xubinnimada kooxaha caalamiga ah
centralauth-abortlogin-renamed: Akoonkaaga waxaa loo magac-beddelay "$1". Fadlan isticmaal magacaas beddelkiisa.
centralauth-account-exists: Lama abuuri karo akoon: Magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday waxaa hore u isticmaalaya isticmaale ku jira wiki kale.
centralauth-account-exists-reset: Magaca isticmaalaha $1 kama diiwaangashana wiki-kan, laakiin waxaad dib uga dejin kartaa erayga sirta ah [[Special:CentralAuth/$1|wiki uu ka diiwaangashan yahay]].
centralauth-account-expired: Lama abuuri karo akoon ku meelgaar ah si toos ah: Magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday waxaa isticmaalay akoon ku meelgaar ah oo dhacay.
centralauth-account-rename-exists: Lama abuuri karo akoon: Magaca isticmaalaha hore ayaa loo isticmaalayaa. Fadlan dooro magac kale.
centralauth-account-unattached-exists: Lama abuuri karo akoon: Magaca isticmaalaha mar hore ayaa la isticmaalayaa. Fadlan dooro magac kale.
centralauth-admin-action-hide-lists: Ka qari akoonnada la xushay liiska isticmaalayaasha caalamiga ah
centralauth-admin-action-hide-none: Ka saar qarinta akoonnada la xushay
centralauth-admin-action-hide-oversight: Si buuxda u qari akoonnada la xushay
centralauth-admin-already-unmerged: Ka booday $1, hore ayaa looga qaaday isku darka
centralauth-admin-bad-input: Xulashada isku darka aan sax ahayn.
centralauth-admin-blocked2-indef: Si aan xad lahayn ayaa loo xannibay.
centralauth-admin-delete-confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto akoonkan?
centralauth-admin-delete-description:
Tirtiridda akoonka caalamiga ah waxay kala fogeyn doontaa dhammaan akoonnada maxalliga ah, waxayna ka dhigaysaa magaca caalamiga ah mid u furan in isticmaale kale qaato.  
Dhammaan akoonnada maxalliga ah way sii jiri doonaan.
centralauth-admin-delete-nonexistent: Khalad: akoonka caalamiga ah "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ma jiro.
centralauth-admin-cannot-lock-temporary-: Lama qufuli karo akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah, sababtoo ah haddii la qufulo waxay si fudud u heli karaan akoon ku meelgaar cusub marka ay sameeyaan wax ka beddelka xiga.
centralauth-admin-delete-success: Akoonka caalamiga ah ee "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" waa la tirtiray
centralauth-admin-info-editcount: Tirada guud ee wax ka beddelka:
centralauth-admin-info-editcountsum: Wadarta tirada wax ka beddellada maxalliga ah:
centralauth-admin-info-expired: Koontada ku meelgaarka ah waa dhacday:
centralauth-admin-intro: Is dhexgalka waxaa loo isticmaali karaa maareynta akoonnada caalamiga ah.
centralauth-admin-logsnippet: Isbeddelladii hore ee akoonka caalamiga ah
centralauth-admin-renamelogsnippet-fromt: Magac beddelladii hore ee ka yimid isticmaalahan
centralauth-admin-renamelogsnippet-tothi: Akownkan hore ayaa loo magac beddelay.
centralauth-admin-renamelogsnippet-fromt: Magaca isticmaalahan hore ayaa loo isticmaalay akoon la magac beddelay.
centralauth-admin-multi-botcheck: U calaamadee gelitaanka [[Special:RecentChanges|{{int:recentchanges}}]] inay yihiin gelitaanno bot ah.
centralauth-admin-multi-intro: Cusboonaysii dhowr akoon oo caalami ah hal mar
centralauth-admin-multi-searchprefix: Ama, ka raadi magacyada isticmaalayaasha leh horgale
centralauth-admin-multi-username: Geli hal ama ka badan magacyo isticmaalayaal ah, adigoo kala saaraya khad cusub
centralauth-admin-no-unified: Ma jiro akoon mideysan oo leh magacan isticmaale.
centralauth-admin-none-selected: Ma jiraan akoonno la xushay oo wax laga beddelo.
centralauth-admin-nonexistent: Ma jiro akoon caalami ah oo loogu talagalay "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>".
centralauth-admin-not-authorized: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku fuliso ficilkan.
centralauth-admin-permission: Kaliya wakiilada ayaa isku dari kara akoonnada dadka kale.
centralauth-admin-rename-in-progress: Akoonkani hadda waa la magac beddelayaa. Waxaad [[Special:GlobalRenameProgress/$1|eegi kartaa horumarka]] ee magac beddelka. Diiwaanka guud ee magac beddelka isticmaalahan hoos ayaa lagu muujiyay.
centralauth-admin-setstatus-success: Waxaad beddeshay xaaladda akoonka caalamiga ah "$1".
centralauth-admin-status-hidden-list: Akoonkani waa laga qariyey liiska isticmaalayaasha caalamiga ah
centralauth-admin-status-hidden-oversigh: Akoonkani si buuxda ayaa loo qariyey
centralauth-admin-status-intro: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa foomkan si aad u beddesho xaaladda akoonkan caalamiga ah.
centralauth-admin-status-nonexistent: Khalad: akoonka caalamiga ah "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ma jiro.
centralauth-admin-status-reasons:
* Sababaha guud ee qufulka
** akoon kaliya kharibaad
** akoon kaliya loogu talagalay spam
* Sababaha caamka ah ee quful + qarinta
** magac isticmaal aan habboonayn
** macluumaad shakhsiyeed oo aan ku habboonayn
centralauth-admin-suppressreason: Waxaa si caalami ah u qariyay $1 sababo la xiriira: $2
centralauth-admin-too-many-edits: Akoonka caalamiga ah "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" waxa uu leeyahay in ka badan $2 {{PLURAL:$2|wax ka beddel|wax ka beddello}}, sidaas darteed lama qarin karo.
centralauth-admin-unhide-nonexistent: Khalad: akoonka caalamiga ah "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ma jiro.
centralauth-admin-globalblock-exempt-lis: Wiki-yada laga reebay xannibaadda caalamiga ah
centralauth-attach-list-attached: Akoonka mideysan ee lagu magacaabo "$1" waxaa ku jira akoonnada soo socda:
centralauth-attach-success: Akoonka waxaa loo wareejiyay akoonka mideysan.
centralauth-attach-text:
Akoonkani weli looma wareejin akoonka mideysan.  
Haddii akoonka caalamiga ah adigana uu kaa yahay, waxaad isku dari kartaa akoonkan adigoo gelinaya erayga sirta ah ee akoonka caalamiga ah:
centralauth-automatic-global-groups-reas: Kooxaha caalamiga ah si otomaatig ah ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay sababtoo ah isbeddelka kooxda maxalliga ah.
Si otomaatig ah ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay kooxaha caalamiga ah sababo la xiriira isbeddelka kooxaha caalamiga ah.
Si otomaatig ah ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay kooxaha caalamiga ah kadib markii qaabeynta la beddelay.
centralauth-block-already-locked: Akoonka [[Special:CentralAuth/$1|$1]] hore ayaa caalami ahaan loo qufulay.
centralauth-centralautologin-desc:
Boggan gaarka ah waxaa si gudaha ah u adeegsada MediaWiki.  
Markaad booqato domain ku xiran adigoon soo gelin, nidaamka gelitaanka dhexe ayaa isticmaala boggan si uu u ogaado inaad ku soo gashay domain-ka dhexe iyo in kale.  
Waxaad codsatay boggan adigoon bixin wax xog aqoonsi ah, sidaas darteed wax hawl ah ma qabanayo.
centralauth-centralautologin-logged-in: {{GENDER:$2|Adiga}} waxaad si dhexe ugu soo gashay akoon ahaan $1. Dib u cusboonaysii bogga si aad u dhaqan geliso dejimahaaga isticmaalaha.
centralauth-complete: Isku xirka gelitaanka waa la dhammaystiray!
centralauth-complete-text: Waxaad hadda gali kartaa wixii wiki ah ee {{int:Centralauth-groupname}} adigoon abuurin akoon cusub.
centralauth-contribs-locked:
Koontadan waa mid caalami ahaan la qufulay.
Eeg [[Special:CentralAuth/$1|faahfaahinta koontada caalamiga ah]] si aad u hesho macluumaad dheeraad ah.
centralauth-contribs-locked-log:
Akoonkan si caalami ah ayaa loo qufulay.
Diiwaankii ugu dambeeyay ee qufulka ayaa hoos lagu bixiyey si tixraac loogu qaato:
centralauth-createlocal-already-exists: Waxaa hore u jiray akoon maxalli ah oo u dhigma akoonka caalamiga ah ee la cayimay.
centralauth-createlocal-no-global-accoun: Ma jiro akoon caalami ah oo sidan oo kale ah.
centralauth-createlocal-pretext: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa foomkan si aad ugu samayso akoon maxalli ah akoon caalami ah haddii uusan isagu samaysan karin sababo jira awgood.
centralauth-createlocal-success: Akoon maxalli ah ayaa la sameeyay.
centralauth-createlocal-suppressed: Ma abuuri kartid akoon maxalli ah isticmaalaha la qariyay.
centralauth-disabled-dryrun:
Isku xirka akoonnada hadda wuxuu ku jiraa hab demo / khalad ah, sidaas darteed hawlaha isku darka dhabta ah waa la joojiyay.  
Raalli noqo!
centralauth-editgroup-delete-removemembe: Waa inaad ka saartaa dhammaan xubnaha koox ka hor inta aadan tirtirin kooxdaas.
centralauth-editgroup-display: Magaca kooxeed ee luqadda la waafajiyay:
centralauth-editgroup-invalid-name: Magaca kooxda caalamiga ah ee la bixiyay waa khalad
centralauth-editgroup-invalid-name-lower: Aqoonsiyada kooxaha caalamiga ah waa inay dhammaantood noqdaan xarfo yaryar.
centralauth-editgroup-member: Magaca luqadda la waafajiyay ee xubnaha kooxda:
centralauth-editgroup-nonexistent: Kooxda caalamiga ah ee "$1" hadda ma jirto.
centralauth-editgroup-rename-taken: Magac beddelku wuu fashilmay: waxaa hore u jira koox leh magaca $1.
centralauth-editgroup-restrictions: Liiska wiki-yada ay kooxdani ka shaqeyso:
centralauth-editgroup-success-text:
Kooxda caalamiga ah $1 waa la cusboonaysiiyay.  
[[Special:GlobalGroupPermissions|Ku noqo maareynta kooxda]]
centralauth-editset-badname: Magaca deji waa khalad ama waa madhan.
centralauth-editset-intro-ro: Hoos waxaa ku yaal liiska dejiyada wiki ee jira.
centralauth-editset-intro-rw:
Dejiyada wiki ee soo socda hore ayaa loo abuuray.  
Waad eegi kartaa oo wax ka beddeli kartaa mid kasta, ama waxaad abuuri kartaa deji cusub.
centralauth-editset-legend-edit: Wax ka beddelka u deji wiki "$1"
centralauth-editset-legend-rw: Wax ka beddel ama samee u deji wiki
centralauth-editset-optin: Ku saleysan oggolaansho (waxay ku jiraan kaliya wiki-yada la cayimay)
centralauth-editset-optout: Ku saleysan ka bixid (waxay ku jiraan dhammaan wiki-yada marka laga reebo kuwa la cayimay)
centralauth-editset-restwikis: Wiki-yada aan ku jirin kuwa kor ku xusan:
centralauth-editset-setexists: Deji magacaas hore ayuu u jiraa.
centralauth-error-badtoken: Calaamadda xaqiijinta ee la bixiyay waa dhacday ama waa khalad.
centralauth-error-badtoken-title: Calaamadda URL-ka soo celinta waa khalad
centralauth-error-sul3-expired: Xaqiijinta waa lagu guuleystay laakiin fadhigaaga  waa dhacay. Fadlan guji "{{int:pt-login}}" si aad u soo celiso.
centralauth-error-locked: Ma tafatiri kartid sababtoo ah akoonkaaga waa la qufulay.
centralauth-error-nologinattempt: Lama abuuri karin fadhi firfircoon. Tani waxay dhici kartaa sababtoo ah biraawsarkaaga ma kaydiyo kukiyada.
centralauth-error-token-wrongattempt:
Calaamadda xaqiijinta kuma xirna isku daygaaga gelitaanka ee hadda.  
Qof ayaa laga yaabaa inuu isku dayayo inuu ku galo akoon kuu muuqda mid xaasidnimo ah.
centralauth-error-token-wronguser:
Calaamadda xaqiijinta kuma waafaqsana magaca isticmaalaha ee fadhigaaga hadda.  
Qof ayaa laga yaabaa inuu isku dayayo inuu ku galo akoon kuu muuqda mid xaasidnimo ah.  
Haddii aad si fudud u rabto inaad ku gasho isticmaale kale, fadlan marka hore ka bax.
centralauth-error-wrongprovider: Boggan gaarka ah lama heli karo marka la isticmaalayo $1.
centralauth-error-securitylevel: Heerka amniga ee gelitaanka dhexe iyo gelitaanka maxalliga ahi isma waafaqin.
centralauth-warning-reauth: Fadhigaaga gelitaanka dhexe wuu dhacay. Fadlan mar kale soo gal si aad u sii wadato.
centralauth-finish-incomplete:
Dhowr akoon ayaa lagu mideeyay iyadoo la isticmaalayo eraygan sirta ah.  
Akoonnada kale weli lama xaqiijin.
centralauth-finish-noconfirms: Ma jirin akoonnno lagu xaqiijin karo iyadoo la isticmaalayo eraygan sirta ah.
centralauth-finish-text: Haddii akoonnadan ay adiga ku leeyihiin, waxaad dhammaystiri kartaa habka mideynta gelitaanka adigoo si fudud halkan ugu qoraya furayaasha sirta ah ee akoonnada kale:
centralauth-finishglobaliseemail_body:
Ciwaankaaga iimaylka waxaa lala xiriiriyay akoonka "$2" dhammaan mashaariicda, iyadoo akoonkaaga ugu weyn uu ku yaal {{SITENAME}}.

Si loo xaqiijiyo in akoonkani dhab ahaan adiga kuu leeyahay, loona mideeyo akoonnada aan si toos ah loo midayn, iyo si aad u soo ceshato akoonkaaga haddii aad lumiso erayga sirta ah, fadlan fur xiriiriyahaan biraawsarkaaga:

$3

Haddii akoonku uusan adiga kuu ahayn, raac xiriiriyaha si aad u joojiso xaqiijinta ciwaanka iimaylka:

$5

Koodhkan xaqiijinta wuxuu dhacayaa $6 at $7.
centralauth-foreign-contributions: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|wax ku biirin|wax ku biirino}} oo ku saabsan $2
centralauth-globalgroupperms-group-wikis: U deji wiki-yada ay kooxdani ka shaqeyso: $1
centralauth-globalgroupperms-groups-intr: Tani waa liiska dhammaan kooxaha isticmaalayaasha caalamiga ah ee lagu habeeyay farm-kan wiki, oo ay la socdaan xuquuqda gelitaanka isticmaalaha iyo qalabka wiki-ga. Isticmaalayaasha leh oggolaanshaha waxay tirtiri karaan koox adigoo ka saaraya dhammaan xuquuqda ku xiran.
centralauth-globalgroupperms-nogroups: Ma jiraan kooxo caalami ah oo la qeexay.
centralauth-globalgroupperms-automatic-g: Isticmaalaha si otomaatig ah ayaa loogu qoondeyn doonaa: $1
Si otomaatig ah ayaa loogu qoondeeyaa xubnaha: $1
centralauth-hidden-blockreason: si caalami ah ayaa loo qariyey $1 ee $2 iyadoo sababta soo socota ay tahay: $3
centralauth-incomplete: Isku xirka gelitaanka weli lama dhammaystirin!
centralauth-incomplete-text: Marka gelitaankaaga la mideeyo, waxaad awoodi doontaa inaad ku gasho goob kasta oo wiki ah oo {{int:Centralauth-groupname}} ah adigoon abuurin akoon cusub
centralauth-invalid-wiki: Ma jiro xog ururin wiki ah oo la yiraahdo $1.
centralauth-list-attached: Koontada {{PLURAL:$2|magaceedu yahay "$1" ee goobta soo socota ayaa|magacyadoodu yihiin "$1" ee goobaha soo socda ayaa}} si toos ah loogu xirey akoonka mideysan:
centralauth-list-attached-dryrun: Koontada {{PLURAL:$2|ee lagu magacaabo yahay "$1" ee goobta soo socota|magacyadoodu yihiin "$1" ee goobaha soo socda}} si toos ah ayaa loogu xiri doonaa akoonka mideysan:
centralauth-list-home-dryrun: Erayga sirta ah iyo ciwaanka iimaylka ee lagu dejiyay wiki-kan ayaa loo adeegsan doonaa akoonkaaga mideysan.
centralauth-list-unattached:
Akoonka {{PLURAL:$2|magaciisu yahay "$1" si otomaatig ah looma xaqiijin karo |magacyadoodu yihiin "$1 lama xaqiijin}} in uu adiga ku leeyahay goobaha soo socda;  
waxay u badan tahay {{PLURAL:$2|in uu leeyahay|in ay leeyihiin}} eray sir ah oo ka duwan akoonkaaga ugu weyn:
centralauth-listusers-nolocal: ku lifaaqan ma aha ama maxalli ahaan ma jiro
centralauth-log-header: Diiwaankan waxa ku jira hawlgallada ku saabsan akoonnada caalamiga ah: tirtirid, qufulid iyo furid.
centralauth-login-error-locked: {{GENDER:$1|Adiga}} ma geli kartid sababtoo ah {{GENDER:$1|koontadaada}} waa la xannibay si caalami ah.
centralauth-login-error-usesul3: Lama sii wadi karo gelitaanka sababtoo ah khalad habayn. Tani waa qalad software ah waana la soo sheegay. Fadlan isticmaal badhanka {{int:centralauth-non-login-wiki-buttonlabel}}.
centralauth-logout-no-others: Si otomaatig ah ayaa lagaa saaray mashruucyada kale ee {{int:Centralauth-groupname}}.
centralauth-merge-attempt: '''Hubinaya erayga sirta ah ee la bixiyay oo lala barbar dhigayo akoonnada aan weli la isku darin…'''
centralauth-merge-denied: Waan ka xunnahay, ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku gasho boggan.
centralauth-merge-dryrun-complete:
Dhammaan akoonnada jira si otomaatig ah ayaa loo mideyn karaa!

Weli wax isbeddel ah laguma sameyn akoonnadaada.
centralauth-merge-dryrun-home:
Nidaamka wareejinta ma xaqiijin karin inaad tahay milkiilaha akoonka wiki-ga guriga ee magacaaga isticmaalaha.

Wiki kale ayaa loo aqoonsaday inuu yahay akoonka guriga ee magacaaga; fadlan raac link-ga hoose oo halkaas ku gal si aad u dhammaystirto wareejinta akoonkaaga.
centralauth-merge-dryrun-incomplete:
Waxaad diyaar u tahay inaad sii waddo, laakiin qaar ka mid ah akoonnada si otomaatig ah looma xaqiijin karin mana isla markiiba la wareejin doono.  
Waxaad awoodi doontaa inaad mar dambe isku darto.

Weli wax isbeddel ah laguma sameyn akoonnadaada.
centralauth-merge-home-password:
Wiki-ga guriga ee akoonkan (hoos ku qoran) wuxuu leeyahay eray sir ah oo ka duwan kan aad gelisay.  
Fadlan geli erayga sirta ah ee wiki-ga guriga.
centralauth-merge-method-admin: Si maamul ahaan ayaa akoonka la isku daray
centralauth-merge-method-admin-desc: Waxay muujinaysaa in akoonka maxalliga ah si gacanta ah ay u mideeyeen wakiilada ama maamulayaasha nidaamka.
centralauth-merge-method-empty: Ma jiraan wax ka qayb qaadasho ah
centralauth-merge-method-empty-desc: Waxay muujinaysaa in akoonka maxalliga ah la mideeyay sababtoo ah ma lahayn wax wax ka beddel ah.
centralauth-merge-method-login-desc: Waxay muujinaysaa in akoonka maxalliga ah si otomaatig ah loo abuuray markii isticmaaluhu soo galay.
centralauth-merge-method-mail-desc: Waxay muujinaysaa in akoonka maxalliga ah la mideeyay sababtoo ah ciwaanka iimaylka wuxuu la mid ahaa kan akoonka ugu weyn.
centralauth-merge-method-new-desc: Waxa ay muujinaysaa  in la sameeyey akoon caalami ah si iskeed ah markii la sameeyey akoonkaan maxalliga ah.
centralauth-merge-method-password-desc: Waxay muujinaysaa in akoonka maxalliga ah la mideeyay sababtoo ah isticmaaluhu wuxuu bixiyay eray sir ah oo sax ah.
centralauth-merge-method-primary-desc:
Tani waa wiki-ga markii ugu horreysay lagu mideeyay akoonka.  
Ogsoonow in uu ka duwanaan karo wiki-ga dhabta ah ee guriga ee isticmaalahaas.
centralauth-merge-no-accounts:
Ma jirto akoon la mid ah magacaaga oo laga helay jadwalka raadraaca akoonnada dhexe!  
Xog ururintu waxay u badan tahay inay dhaawacantay.
centralauth-merge-notlogged: Fadlan [$1 soo gal] si aad u hubiso in akoonnadaada si buuxda loo mideeyay.
centralauth-merge-step1-detail:
Fadlan geli erayga sirta ah ee akoonkaaga.  
Erayga sirta ah iyo ciwaanka iimaylka ee diiwaangashan waxaa lala barbardhigi doonaa akoonnada ku yaal wiki-yada kale si loo xaqiijiyo inay is waafaqaan.  
Wax isbeddel ah lama sameyn doono ilaa aad xaqiijiso in wax walba sax yihiin.
centralauth-merge-step2-detail:
Qaar ka mid ah akoonnada si otomaatig ah looma waafajin karin wiki-ga guriga ee la doortay.  
Haddii akoonnadan adiga yihiin, waxaad xaqiijin kartaa inay adiga kuu yihiin adigoo gelinaya erayga sirta ah ee akoonnadaas.
centralauth-merge-step3-detail: Waxaad diyaar u tahay inaad abuurto akoonkaaga mideysan, iyadoo wiki-yada soo socda la ku xirey:
centralauth-merge-welcome:
'''Akoonkaaga isticmaalaha weli la iskuma darin nidaamka gelitaanka mideysan ee {{int:Centralauth-groupname}}.'''

Haddii aad doorato inaad wareejiso akoonnadaada, waxaad isticmaali doontaa isla magaca isticmaale iyo erayga sirta ah si aad ugu gasho dhammaan wiki-yada {{int:Centralauth-groupname}} dhammaan luqadaha la heli karo.

Haddii qof kale hore u qaatay magacaaga isticmaale goob kale, taasi ma saameyn doonto iyaga, laakiin waxay ku siin doontaa fursad aad arrintaas kula xalliso iyaga ama maamulaha mar dambe.
centralauth-mergeaccount-desc: [[Special:MergeAccount|Midee akoonno badan]] ee Single User Login
centralauth-newgroup-intro:
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa foomkan si aad u qoondeyso oggolaansho koox cusub.  
Ogsoonow in koox aysan jirin ilaa loo qoondeeyo oggolaanshooyin.
centralauth-non-login-wiki-buttonlabel-h: Tan u dhig si aad u gasho adigoo isticmaalaya wiki-ga gelitaanka dhexe
centralauth-not-owner-text:
Magaca isticmaalaha "$1" si otomaatig ah ayaa loogu qoondeeyay milkiilaha akoonka ee $2.

Haddii tani adiga tahay, waxaad dhammaystiri kartaa habka mideynta gelitaanka adigoo si fudud halkan u gelinaya erayga sirta ah ee ugu weyn ee akoonkaas:
centralauth-prefs-count-unattached: Akoono aan la xaqiijin oo magacaaga wata ayaa weli ku jira $1 {{PLURAL:$1|wiki|wikiyada}}.
centralauth-prefs-detail-unattached: Akoonkaaga lama xaqiijin inuu ka tirsan yahay akoonka caalamiga ah.
centralauth-readonly: Xog ururinta CentralAuth waa la xiray.
centralauth-readonlytext:
Xog ururinta CentralAuth hadda waa la xiray si aan loo oggolaan gelinno cusub iyo isbeddello kale, badanaa sababo la xiriira dayactir joogto ah, kadibna caadi ayey ku soo noqon doontaa.

Maamulaha nidaamka ee xiray wuxuu bixiyay sharaxaadkan: $1
centralauth-rename-abortlogin: Akoonkaaga hadda waa la beddelayaa ama la mideynayaa. [[Special:GlobalRenameProgress/$1|Eeg xaaladda]].
centralauth-rename-alreadyexists: Magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday horay ayuu u jiray.
centralauth-rename-alreadyinprogress: Hore ayaa loo bilaabay beddelka isticmaalahan, waxaana uu hadda ku jiraa [[Special:GlobalRenameProgress/$1|hab socod]].
centralauth-rename-antispoofconflicts2: Magaca isticmaalaha la doortay aad ayuu ugu egyahay {{PLURAL:$2|magac isticmaalaha jira|magacyada isticmaalayaasha jira}}: $1.
centralauth-rename-previously-renamed-ac: Magacan isticmaalaha hore ayuu u isticmaalay akoon la beddelay.
centralauth-rename-badusername: Magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday ma aha mid sax ah.
centralauth-rename-cannotself: Ma beddeli kartid magacaaga isticmaalaha adiga laftaada.
centralauth-rename-confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad guud ahaan u beddesho magaca isticmaalahan?
centralauth-rename-confirm-vanish: Ma hubtaa inaad si caalami ah u baabi'iso isticmaalahan?
centralauth-rename-form-allowhigheditcou: Xaqiiji inaad beddesho magaca isticmaalaha oo leh in ka badan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|wax ka beddel|wax ka beddelo}}.
centralauth-rename-form-allowpreviouslyr: Ogolow magacyada isticmaalaha ee hore ay u isticmaaleen akoonno magacooda la beddelay
centralauth-rename-form-overrideantispoo: Ka gudub khilaaf kasta oo AntiSpoof ah
centralauth-rename-form-suppressredirect: Ka hortag abuurista dib u jeediyeyaasha
centralauth-rename-globaleditcount-thres: Isticmaalahani wuxuu leeyahay in ka badan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|wax ka beddel|wax ka beddello}}. Fadlan xaqiiji inaad hubto inaad rabto inaad magac beddel ku samayso isticmaalahan.
centralauth-rename-listed-on-denylist: Isticmaalahan wuxuu ku jiraa liiska caalamiga ah ee diidmada magac beddelka. Si magac beddel loogu sameeyo isticmaalahan, liiska diidmada waa in marka hore la beddelaa.
centralauth-rename-movelog: Bogga si otomaatig ah ayaa loo wareejiyay intii lagu jiray magaca beddelka isticmaalaha "[[Special:CentralAuth/$1|$1]]" loona beddelay "[[Special:CentralAuth/$2|$2]]"
centralauth-rename-notinprogress: Ma jiraan wax magaca beddello ah oo socda oo loogu talagalay $1. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay hore u dhammaadeen.
centralauth-rename-progress-list-header: Beddellida magaca caalamiga ah ee soo socda ayaa hadda socda:
centralauth-rename-queued:
Hawlaha magaca looga beddelayo $1 loona beddelayo $2 ayaa safka la geliyay.

Ka eeg horumarka [[Special:GlobalRenameProgress/$2]].
centralauth-rename-same-name: Isticmaaluhu mar hore ayuu leeyahay magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday.
centralauth-rename-titleblacklist-match: Magaca isticmaalaha cusub wuxuu la mid yahay gelitaanka ee soo socda: $1
centralauth-rename-unattached-intheway: Waxaa jira akoonno aan weli la xirin oo isticmaalaya magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday.
centralauth-renameuser-global-inprogress: Beddelka magaca caalamiga ah ee {{GENDER:$1|$1}} hore ayuu u socdaa. [[Special:GlobalRenameProgress/$1|Hubi xaaladda]].
centralauth-renameuser-merged:
Isticmaalaha {{GENDER:$1|$1}} waa la isku daray nidaamka gelitaanka mideysan.  
Haddii aad beddesho magaca, akoonka maxalliga ah wuxuu ka go’i doonaa akoonka caalamiga ah.
centralauth-renameuser-reserved: Magaca isticmaalaha {{GENDER:$2|$2}} waxaa loo qoondeeyay akoon caalami ah.
centralauth-vanish-confirm: Ma hubtaa in aad baabi'iso akoonkaaga? Tallaabadan lama soo celin karo.
centralauth-return-username-token: Calaamada magaca isticmaalaha oo ka mid ah URL-ka soo noqoshada.
centralauth-return-username-token-help: Calaamada magaca isticmaalaha oo lagu daro URL-ka soo noqoshada kadib marka isticmaaluhu si guul leh uga soo galo wiki-ga gelitaanka dhexe.
centralauth-rightslog-header: Diiwaankan waxa uu ka kooban yahay hawlgallada ku saabsan kooxaha caalamiga ah: isbeddellada xubinnimada iyo oggolaanshaha
centralauth-state-mismatch: Qalad: Xaaladda akoonkan ayaa is beddeshay inta lagu jiray hawlgalka. Fadlan hubi xaaladda hadda jirta oo isku day mar kale haddii loo baahdo.
centralauth-token-mismatch: Waan ka xunnahay, ma aanan awoodin inaan farsameyno gudbinta foomkaaga sababtoo ah xogta kalfadhiga ayaa luntay.
centralauth-scrambled: Sababo la xiriira gelitaan aan sharci ahayn oo lagu sameeyay akoonkaaga, akoonkaaga waa la joojiyay. Fadlan [[Special:PasswordReset|dib u deji eraygaaga sirta ah]] si aad u soo celiso.
centralauth-scrambled-noemail: Sababo la xiriira gelitaan aan sharci ahayn oo lagu sameeyay akoonkaaga, akoonkaaga waa la joojiyay.
centralauth-scrambled-cannotusesame: Fadlan isticmaal eray sir ah oo ka duwan kan hadda jira.
createlocalaccount: Si khasab ah u samee akoon maxalli ah
globalrenameprogress-legend: Eeg horumarka magac beddelka caalamiga ah
globalrenamequeue: Safka codsiyada magac beddelka caalamiga ah

Fiiro gaar ah: $3

globalrenamequeue-email-subject-rejected: Codsiga magac beddelka akoonka waa la diiday

globalrenamequeue-request-previously-ren: Magacan isticmaalaha hore ayuu u isticmaalay akoon la beddelay.
globalrenamequeue-request-comments-help-: Marka la diidayo codsi baaba'a ah, waa waajib in la bixiyo qoraal sharaxaya sababta diidmada.
globalrenamequeue-request-header: [$1 $2] wuxuu codsanayaa in loo beddelo magaca $3.
globalrenamequeue-request-reason-label: Faallo gelinta diiwaanka guud (haddii la aqbalo)
globalrenamequeue-request-savefailed: Khalad ayaa dhacay marka la kaydinayay isbeddelka xaaladda codsiga.
globalrenamequeue-request-titleblacklist: Magaca isticmaalaha la doortay wuxuu la mid yahay gelitaanka Liiska Madow ee Cinwaanka ee soo socda: $1

* wiki-ga guriga: $2

* tirada caalamiga ee wax ka beddelka: $4
globalrenamequeue-request-vanish-no-reas: Waa in la bixiyo sabab marka la diidayo codsiyada baaba'a.

globalrenamerequest: Codsiga magac beddelka akoonka isticmaalaha caalamiga ah
globalrenamerequest-email-invalid: Ciwaanka iimaylka la bixiyay ma aha mid sax ah.
globalrenamerequest-email-mismatch:
Ciwaannada iimaylka way kala duwan yihiin.
Fadlan labadaba hubi oo mar kale isku day.
globalrenamerequest-email-why-explain:
Waxaan u baahanahay ciwaan iimayl inta lagu jiro hawshan si loo hubiyo inaadan lumin gelitaanka akoonkan.
Waxaad ka saari kartaa ciwaanka iimaylka kadib marka hawsha beddelka magaca la dhammaystiro.
globalrenamerequest-email2-help: Geli isla ciwaanka iimaylka aad kor ku qortay si loo xaqiijiyo.
globalrenamerequest-forced: Beertan wiki-ga wuxuu mideynayaa magacyada isticmaalayaasha dhammaan mashaariicda. Magacan isticmaalaha ayaa lagu arkay inuu ka jiro wikiyada kale, sidaas darteed waa in la beddelaa si loo dhameystiro mideynta. Natiijadaas awgeed, waa inaad doorataa magac isticmaale cusub.
globalrenamerequest-legend: Codsi beddel magac si loo mideeyo isticmaalayaasha
globalrenamerequest-newname-err-invalid: Ma aadan qorin magac isticmaale sax ah.
globalrenamerequest-newname-err-taken: Magaca isticmaalaha la geliyay hore ayuu u isticmaal yahay. Fadlan dooro magac kale.
globalrenamerequest-newname-help: Geli magaca cusub ee aad rabto inaad isticmaasho, tusaale ahaan "$1".
globalrenamerequest-newname-help-basic: Geli magaca cusub ee aad rabto inaad isticmaasho.
globalrenamerequest-pretext:
Codso magac isticmaale cusub oo lagugu yaqaan dhammaan mashaariicda.

Dhammaan waxyaabihii aad hore u tafatirtay waxaa lagu xiriirin doonaa magacan cusub.

Liiska codsiyada lagu sameeyo foomkan waxaa heli doona dadka awoodda u leh fulinta hawshan. Waxaa lagugu wargelin doonaa iimayl marka hawshani dhammaato.

Haddii codsigaagu la xiriira rabitaan qarsoodi/nabadgelyo gaar ahaaneed, fadlan ogow in diiwaan joogto ah la samayn doono oo lagu xusi doono magacaagii hore. Sidaas darteed, waxaad sidoo kale ka fiirsan kartaa inaad si fudud [[Special:CreateAccount|sameysato akoon cusub oo madax bannaan]], kadibna akoonkaaga hadda loo beddelo magac aan caadi ahayn oo aad ka tagto.
globalrenamerequest-save-error: Lama kaydin codsiga. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
globalrenamerequest-self-error: Ma oggolaan kartid codsigan maadaama aan laguu oggolayn inaad adigu beddesho magaca akoonkaaga.
globalrenamerequest-self-warning: Waxaad kaliya diidi kartaa codsigan maadaama aan laguu oggolayn inaad adigu beddesho magaca akoonkaaga.
globalrenamerequest-status-text:
Codsigaaga beddelka magaca isticmaalaha hadda wuu socdaa oo wuxuu sugayaa oggolaansho ka yimaada dadka awoodda u leh hawshan. Waxaa lagugu wargelin doonaa iimayl marka codsiga la farsameeyo.

;Magaca isticmaalaha hadda:
:$1
;Magaca la codsaday:
:$2
globalrenamerequest-status-title: Codsiga beddelka magaca ayaa sugaya oggolaansho
globalvanishrequest-pretext:
Baaba'du waa '''miciinka ugu dambeeya''' waana in '''la isticmaalaa oo kaliya marka aad rabto inaad joojiso wax ka beddelka weligaa''' iyo sidoo kale si aad u qariso inta ugu badan ee xiriirradiisii hore. Tirtiridda koontada waxaa lagu sameeyaa iyadoo la beddelayo magaca koontadaada si dadka kale aysan u aqoonsan wax ku darsashadaada nidaamka loo yaqaanno baaba'da koontada. '''Baaba'du ma dammaanad qaadayso qarsoodi buuxda ama ma tirtirto wax ku darsashadii mashaariicda'''.

Si aad u sii waddo bilaabista nidaamka baaba'aya, fadlan buuxi foomka codsiga ee Baaba'da Koontada ee hoos ku qoran.
globalvanishrequest-status-text: Codsigaaga baaba'a akoonka hadda wuu socdaa oo wuxuu sugayaa oggolaansho ka yimaada dadka awoodda u leh hawshan. Waxaa lagugu wargelin doonaa iimayl marka codsiga la farsameeyo.
globalvanishrequest-vanished-title: Codsiga baaba'a akoonka si guul leh ayaa loo fuliyay
globalvanishrequest-vanished-text: Codsigaaga baaba'a ee magaca isticmaalaha si guul leh ayaa loo fuliyay.
globalvanishrequest-blocked-title: Codsiga baaba’a ee koontada guud waa la diiday sababtoo ah koontadaada waa la xannibay
globalvanishrequest-blocked-text: Hadda waxaa lagaa xannibay hal ama in ka badan oo wiki ah, sidaas darteed ma baabi'in kartid akoonkaaga. Waxaad racfaan ka qaadan kartaa xannibaadaha akoonkaaga. Eeg xiriirradan hoose si aad u hesho macluumaad ku saabsan sida racfaan looga qaato wiki kasta oo lagaa xannibay. Si aad wax badan uga ogaato baaba'a akoonka, booqo bogga macluumaadka [[m:Special:MyLanguage/Account vanishing|baaba'a akoonka]].
globalvanishrequest-blocked-text-minimal: Hadda waxaa lagaa xannibay hal ama in ka badan oo wiki ah, sidaas darteed ma baabi'in kartid akoonkaaga. Si aad wax badan uga ogaato baaba'a akoonka, booqo bogga macluumaadka [[m:Special:MyLanguage/Account vanishing|baaba'a akoonka]].
globalvanishrequest-globaluser-error: Lama kaydin codsiga. Koontada isticmaalaha ma aha akoon caalami ah.
globalvanishrequest-blocked-error: Akoonkaaga waxaa saaran xannibaado, sidaas darteed lama baabi'in karo
globalvanishrequest-pending-request-erro: Waxaad hore u leedahay codsi baaba'a oo socda. Booqo bogga [[Special:GlobalVanishRequest/status|xaaladda]] si aad u hesho macluumaad dheeraad ah.
globalvanishrequest-save-error: Lama kaydin codsiga. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
globalvanishrequest-autoapprove-note: Codsigaaga baaba'a ee magaca isticmaalaha si guul leh ayaa loo fuliyay.
globalvanishrequest-autoapprove-public-n: Codsigan baaba'a ee isticmaalaha si otomaatig ah ayaa loo oggolaaday.
globalvanishrequest-rejected-subject-not: Codsiga baaba'a akoonka waa la diiday ($1)
globalvanishrequest-rejected-body-notifi:
Codsiga baaba'a akoonka waa la diiday, faahfaahinta hoose:

Magaca isticmaalaha: $1  
Wiki-ga guriga: $2  
Tirada guud ee wax ka beddelka: $3  
Xanniban: $4  
Sababta codsiga vanish: $5  
Cidda diidday: $6  
Fiirooyinka diidmada: $7  
La codsaday: $8  
La dhammaystiray: $9
globalvanishrequest-rejected-notificatio: Lama awoodo in si otomaatig ah loogu wargeliyo kooxda sharciga. Fadlan si gacanta ah ugu dir iimaylka ku saabsan diidmada codsiga baaba'a akoonka. Diidmada codsiga waa la dhammaystiray.
